item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns responds to Australians reportedly fuming over Anzac Day public holiday
item.description: The NSW premier has labelled the extra day off a ‘common sense change’ as other leaders face pressure to follow suit.

item.title: Oscar Piastri weighs in on F1 rival Max Verstappen’s situation: ‘Not a great look’
item.description: The Aussie says it will be a ‘big loss’ if the champion walks away from the sport.

item.title: John Mountain: Perth chef who clashed with Tash Peterson apologises after ‘stupid’ gang rape joke sparks fury
item.description: A popular chef and restaurant owner in Perth’s northern suburbs is under fire after using the term ‘gang rape’ in a social media post to describe a busy night at the venue.

item.title: Aussie Olympic legend Ariarne Titmus to boost Seven’s live and free Commonwealth Games coverage
item.description: The swimming great is thrilled she’ll no longer be the ‘worst looking person’ at the pool.

item.title: NSW father’s heartbreaking tribute after Meaghan Bowler, 32, allegedly murdered by husband in US
item.description: ‘She was just a beautiful, ambitious, kind, and trusting girl.’

item.title: Townsville mum loses fallopian tube after alleged hospital neglect
item.description: After being sent home four times, she says a missed diagnosis turned into a life-altering emergency.

item.title: Meta and Microsoft slash thousands of jobs amid rise of artificial intelligence
item.description: The company says the cuts are for the sake of efficiency and to allow new investments in parts of its business.

item.title: Bizarre moment driver flees after apparent ‘ram raid’ on Supercars team Triple Eight Race Engineering’s Banyo HQ
item.description: CCTV footage showed the man’s ‘unbelievable’ effort to crash into the building - before his escape left a legend baffled.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: When Anthony Albanese plans to step down as Prime Minister as he warns of tough budget ahead
item.description: ‘Then I’ll know it is time to watch the footy every Saturday rather than do this job.’

item.title: Melbourne's 'butterfly boy' born with Epidermolysis Bullosa takes first steps after groundbreaking treatment
item.description: The four-year-old boy born with a rare genetic condition couldn't walk just months ago.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of French Open in ‘painful’ blow for tennis
item.description: The superstar has issued a statement, saying it is ‘a difficult time for me’.

item.title: Aussie tennis star Alex de Minaur ‘embarrassed’ by rising teenager Rafael Jodar at Madrid Open
item.description: ‘He looked lost out there.’

item.title: ‘I will always be part of the royal family,’ Prince Harry said during whirlwind tour
item.description: Prince Harry says during a visit to Ukraine he is ‘doing the very thing that I was born to do’.

item.title: Mounjaro, diabetes and weight loss drug, won't be listed on PBS after negotiations collapse
item.description: Around 450,000 Australians will continue paying hundreds of dollars a month for their medication.

item.title: Pat Cummins cops rude welcome back to cricket from 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
item.description: The Australian got the last laugh over his ‘new favourite player’ in his first match since the Ashes.

item.title: Grand slam champion Iga Swiatek reduced to tears as ‘sad’ health battle forces Madrid Open retirement
item.description: ‘There is something going on’ and it’s taken down a key player just weeks out from the French Open.

item.title: Ronan Androgenic: Brisbane looksmaxxing influencer arrested during livestream
item.description: Ronan Androgenic has become a rising star among a generation increasingly obsessed with extreme beauty improvement.

item.title: Sam Neill reveals cancer battle and fight for life-saving treatment access
item.description: The Jurassic Park star is on a mission to help Australians access the treatment that gave him a second chance.

item.title: New washing machines to feature dual start function for child safety
item.description: The change follows a fatal accident in New Zealand in 2021.

item.title: Seasonal depression: The yearly blues hitting Australians as the temperature cools
item.description: Thousands of Australians are impacted as the mercury drops every year.

item.title: Trump shooting: How White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner transformed into chaos — and a crime scene
item.description: Guests were picking at salads when it became apparent the night had taken a turn.

item.title: Fresh uncertainty surrounds Sam Kerr’s Chelsea future after new comments from coach Sonia Bompastor
item.description: ‘Sam deserves what’s happening to her.’

item.title: Mel Schilling’s husband shares update on ‘next chapter’ following reality TV star’s death
item.description: ‘Maddie and I have drawn enormous strength from how so very loved she was and is.’

item.title: Magda Szubanski unwittingly becomes face of online health scam amid cancer remission
item.description: ‘She’s being used just like me.’

item.title: Natalie Bassingthwaighte reveals how she prepared for her most ‘brutal’ challenge yet on SAS: AUS V ENG
item.description: ‘It’s very intimidating and can feel really scary.’

item.title: St Kilda coach Ross Lyon issues emotional apology for ‘casual racism’ comment at training
item.description: The coach offered to consider his position after hurting his Indigenous players with the remark.

item.title: Carlton club doctor Matt Chamberlain takes leave amid Elijah Hollands investigation
item.description: The respected medical professional is also considering his legal options as the investigation continues.

item.title: Sydney family’s heartbreaking warning to women after high-achieving mother-of-three dies weeks after giving birth
item.description: ‘As a mother, you put everybody else in front of yourself ... Don’t dismiss even the smallest symptoms.’

item.title: Pre-dawn Russian drone attack on Odesa in Ukraine wounds 14
item.description: The drones hit residential neighbourhoods and civilian infrastructure in a key Black Sea port city.

item.title: Cash Out Day: Aussies urged to make ATM withdrawal in message to banks that ‘we don’t want to lose access to cash’
item.description: A grassroots push is about to go into overdrive, as the number of ATMs and bank branches continues to tumble.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Iran offers plan to open Strait of Hormuz if the US ends blockade but Trump’s nuclear demands go unanswered
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Coalition to double fuel reserves in new plan to strengthen Australia’s supply chains
item.description: The proposal includes setting up an $800 million facility to deliver at least one billion litres of new onshore storage.

item.title: Aussie veteran Josh Hazlewood produces bowling masterpiece in IPL win over Delhi Capitals
item.description: The 35-year-old has continued his hot form since returning from injury.

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla US tour: The royals welcomed by US President Donald Trump to begin the four-day visit
item.description: Their arrival comes as much of the capital remains on edge in the wake of Saturday’s White House shooting.

item.title: How Victoria’s 20 per cent car registration rebate will work and how much you can save
item.description: Motorists have two months to apply for the rebate before it closes. Here is everything you need to know.

item.title: One Direction singer Harry Styles and actress Zoë Kravitz are engaged
item.description: The pair first sparked engagement speculation after Kravitz was spotted wearing a huge diamond ring on her wedding finger.

item.title: Millions of Aussie credit card holders and lendees unaware they’re owed junk‑insurance refunds as complaints surge
item.description: Only a fraction of eligible Australians have come forward.

item.title: Taylor Swift files to trademark her voice and image to protect against the rise of AI scams
item.description: If successful, there is potential Swift could potentially also ‘challenge imitations that are confusingly similar.’

item.title: Family of Finnish construction worker killed in Brisbane scaffolding accident demand answers
item.description: ‘Nobody should go to work and never come back.’

item.title: Gunman, 89, arrested after Greece shootings injure four in Athens
item.description: The 89-year-old opened fire in a social security office and a courthouse.

item.title: United Arab Emirates intends to leave OPEC oil cartel after six decades of membership
item.description: The move comes as the country chaffed under production restrictions.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: King Charles’ speech to US lawmakers addresses war on the 250th independence anniversary
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Jarome Luai answers burning tax-free question as PNG Chiefs contract confirmed
item.description: The superstar has fronted up after contract clauses allowed him to swap Wests Tigers for the Chiefs.

item.title: US to issue passports featuring Donald Trump’s picture to commemorate America’s 250th anniversary
item.description: Trump’s face and his signature in gold will appear on the inside cover.

item.title: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson brags about ‘amazing’ new private plane and millions in donations
item.description: ‘I cannot thank you enough for the hope and encouragement.’

item.title: G8 Education reveals full list of 40 childcare centres to be closed down
item.description: Parents across the country have been caught off guard and staff facing an uncertain future.

item.title: The Agenda Setters stocks after R7: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘That is not what they brought.’

item.title: Would you eat this? Woolworths shoppers divided over marked-down pack of grey-toned mince
item.description: From ‘already rotten’ to ‘still safe to eat’, the off-colour mince has sparked a beef online.

item.title: Socceroos star Jackson Irvine slams FIFA giving inaugural peace prize to President Trump: ‘Mockery’
item.description: ‘Decisions like that feel like they just set us back.’

item.title: Injury-cursed Fremantle star Aine Tighe ruled out for 2026 AFLW season as knee concern lingers
item.description: ‘This decision gives her the best opportunity to prioritise her long-term health.’

item.title: Parafield crash: Two dead, several rushed to hospital after light plane smashes into hangar at Adelaide airport
item.description: Emergency crews remain on the scene to determine what caused the accident.

item.title: ‘Super f....d up’: Joe Rogan takes aim at Australia’s government again on controversial podcast
item.description: ‘Australia is such a crazy place, man.’

item.title: Man charged after alleged tiny home theft stopped by ‘hero’ locals in citizen’s arrest in Bli Bli, Sunshine Coast
item.description: Two men trained in martial arts stepped in until police arrived.

item.title: Harry Potter-themed Forbidden Forest Experience in Perth met with opposition over fears for native wildlife
item.description: ‘It is in the wrong place, at the wrong time, for too long.’

item.title: Work from home jobs surge according to Seek data as Australians embrace flexible working arrangements
item.description: A growing number of job advertisements are now promoting their flexible working options.

item.title: New advice on catch-up moves to start building wealth in your 40s, 50s and beyond
item.description: ‘It’s never too late.’

item.title: Four minutes of daily movement could help prevent type 2 diabetes, study finds
item.description: A new study reveals the surprisingly simple daily habit that could slash your risk of type 2 diabetes by more than a third.

item.title: Prince and Princess of Wales William and Kate share family photo to mark 15th wedding anniversary
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have marked their 15th wedding anniversary.

item.title: Ripper GC general manager Nick Adams debunks ‘panic’ myth surrounding future of LIV Golf
item.description: ‘That’s the only information I have at this stage.’

item.title: King and a joker: Charles disarms US hosts with quips at state dinner in Washington
item.description: ‘King George never set foot in America and, please rest assured, I am not here as part of some cunning rearguard action.’

item.title: Man arrested after two stabbed in London Jewish area Golders Green
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said ‘attacks on our Jewish community are attacks on Britain’.

item.title: Conspiracy theories run rife after Donald Trump assassination attempt
item.description: Was the US president’s attempted assassination staged to bolster support for his new $400 million ballroom? That’s what some people believe.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.description: ‘It’s really hard to put into words what it means for the franchise.’

item.description: The Lions co-captain still recalls the three questions he was asked by the first-time coach.

item.title: Saudi Arabia to pull funding for LIV Golf, according to Wall Street Journal
item.description: Players are set to be informed of the situation this week.

item.title: OceanGate widow given shoeboxes of dead husband and son’s ‘slush’ after tragedy
item.description: Nine months after the tragedy, two small boxes were given to the widow and mother.

item.title: Duo charged after drone allegedly used to deliver drugs across Wollongong
item.description: Police allegedly found drugs and the small device after it crashed in an apartment complex.

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese backs Bondi Beach royal commission recommendations into gun reform and national security
item.description: Fifteen innocent people were killed in Australia’s worst terror attack.

item.title: Brisbane Lions issue statement as ‘fanclub’ account spreads fake stories about players
item.description: ‘Some of these stories are regarding real news events and falsely involving our playing group.’

item.title: Rival clubs put on high alert after Jarome Luai bombshell’s decision to join PNG Chiefs
item.description: The Chiefs believe any NRL player can be attainable after the recruitment of the superstar.

item.title: Leapmotor fixes one of its most annoying 'features'
item.description: The Chinese brand says new export-market models will get a physical key, while existing models are expected to follow with a model-year update.

item.title: Grief-stricken Adelaide captain Jordan Dawson ruled out of Showdown
item.description: The club are giving the midfielder all the time he needs after the tragic death of his brother.

item.title: Missing five-year-old NT girl Kumanjayi Little Baby found dead as police arrest Jefferson Lewis
item.description: Police confirmed late on Thursday the 47-year-old had been taken into custody.

item.description: ‘That’s not a step the sport would accept.’

item.title: Olympic hero Benjamin Karl faces backlash as ‘macho’ marriage comments ignite firestorm
item.description: The controversy began when the snowboarder’s wife said she wanted to go on a girls’ trip.

item.title: Saints coach Ross Lyon slams ‘compromised’ draft after AFL’s ‘weak’ changes
item.description: The coach believes the league hasn’t gone far enough in overhauling the draft.

item.title: Ford follows GM in boosting its 2026 financial forecast after tariff refunds
item.description: The second US auto giant in as many days has lifted its earnings outlook, with tariff refunds providing a much-needed boost.

item.description: The 40-year-old died of cardiac arrest linked to an undiagnosed heart condition, prompting a warning to women.

item.title: ‘Snapped’: Fugitive Keith Lees to stand trial nearly 30 years after Meaghan Rose killing
item.description: Decades after Meaghan Rose’s body was found at the base of a cliff, her suspected killer will stand trial.

item.title: Much-loved Queensland jockey Shane McGovern undergoes second leg amputation in ‘devastating’ update
item.description: The ‘tough as nails’ Aussie faces a long recovery after getting trapped under his horse in a freak accident.

item.description: The first Paul Smith Edition to be offered in Australia has landed, adding the designer’s playful character to the Cooper SE electric hatch.

item.title: Crime scene declared as Gold Coast police investigate partner of Annastacia Palaszczuk
item.description: No charges have been laid.

item.title: Essendon young gun Nik Cox’s 630-day nightmare ends with AFL return: ‘Awesome story’
item.description: The 24-year-old is finally back after staving off retirement.

item.title: Toxic black mould fears put Queensland’s Logan Police Station at risk of shutdown, with officers relocated amid health concerns
item.description: Two officers fell ill and one later died, with his family alleging mould exposure was the cause.

item.title: Family’s desperate plea as four-year-old Western Sydney girl loses most of her hair to alopecia
item.description: ‘She wants to know why… why is she losing her hair, why does it have to be her that’s going bald?’

item.title: Geely previews next-generation Galaxy concept and 745kW off-road platform
item.description: China's Geely has showcased its new design language and hybrid technologies, plus a 1000hp tri-motor 4WD platform at Auto China 2026.

item.title: ‘Injuries keep coming at Richmond as cursed season takes down former No.1 draft pick Sam Lalor
item.description: The midfielder becomes the 16th player on the injury list and seventh without a set return date.

item.title: Family and community in mourning for beloved pilot Rob Hoyle killed alongside student in ‘horrific’ Parafield Airport crash
item.description: Robert Hoyle — known as ‘Goose’ to his students — had dreamed of flying since childhood.

item.title: Melbourne Storm coach Craig Bellamy diagnosed with a neurodegenerative disorder
item.description: The 66-year-old has received a diagnosis following a series of medical tests in recent weeks.

item.title: Leapmotor wants to take on BYD and Chery with just one brand
item.description: The Stellantis-backed brand says it sees other Chinese brands as its real rivals in Australia, but for now it won’t copy their multi-brand strategy.

item.title: Lou’s Place saved Darlene’s life but without crucial funding a three-day fashion sale is helping keep it open
item.description: ‘This place totally saved my life.’

item.title: Man labelled a ‘hero’ for saving sister from a blaze that destroyed beloved Mustard Seed restaurant in Hahndorf, Adelaide Hills
item.description: ‘He got a lot of fire on him and saved my wife. He’s a brave man.’

item.description: Police claim the 22-year-old made off with more than 900 litres of diesel in large drums and jerry cans.

item.description: Filling up has become their most dangerous act.

item.description: The Blues overpowered a Queensland side battling on after losing two players to head injury assessments.

item.description: The premiership captain might ‘struggle to sleep tonight’ after giving up a ‘sloppy’ free kick.

item.title: 2026 Nissan Navara ST review
item.description: Nissan has reworked its work-ready Navara ute range, and this variant stands out as a tidy new truck for the worksite.

item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Violent riots erupt outside Alice Springs Hospital as suspect Jefferson Lewis arrested over alleged murder of Kumanjayi Little Baby
item.description: Rioters looking for ‘payback’ clashed with police, who were accused of protecting a suspected killer.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei announces dawn of new ‘global order’ in rare statement on Persian Gulf Day
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Questions linger over Scott Pendlebury management as Collingwood draws with Hawthorn: ‘Would have been handy’
item.description: ‘Bloody selfish stuff ... Kelly had to get personal.’

item.title: Patrick Muldoon: Cause of death revealed for Days Of Our Lives and Melrose Place star
item.description: The actor died suddenly aged 57 after announcing a new role on an Australian movie production.

item.title: Much-loved Hawthorn physio Andrew Lambert suffers hamstring tendon damage during night of AFL carnage
item.description: After the epic draw club greats went down to the rooms to check on the beloved staffer.
